Minute Order
DEFENSE ATTNY PETITION FOR PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION FILED TODAY
CONTD PCD PROG RPT/CAL:PRIMARY CAREGIVER PROGRESS REPORT/X:DEFENDANT IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/PROGPCD:05-25-22/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/X:POTENTIAL DISM/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROG RPT/X:DEFENDANT IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONTD PCD PROG RPT/PROGPCD:04-11-22/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/X: THE DEFENDANT APPEARSVIA ZOOM/CONTD PCD PROG RPT/PROGPCD: 01-18-22/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/X: ZOOM OK/

/CAL: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT AND RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM PRETRIAL DIVERSION REGARDING RECOMMENDATIONS AND LENGTH OF DIVERSION/DAWT/X: ON 10-05-21, PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION WAS GRANTED AS TO COUNT 3 ANDTHE CASE WAS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR A PCD PROGRESS REPORT TO BEFILED BY THE NEXT COURT DATE, IN ADDITION, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PRETRIALDIVERSION PROVIDE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION RECOMMENDATIONS, INCLUDING LENGTH OF DIVERSION, THIS REPORT WAS DUE ON 11-10-21,/X: ON 11-10-21,  NO REPORT FROM PRETRIAL DIVERSION WAS RECEIVED; THE  COURT MADE A SECOND REQUEST THAT  PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROVIDE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION RECOMMENDATIONS, INCLUDING LENGTH OF DIVERSION, THIS REPORT WAS DUE ON 12-09-21,/X: ON12-09-21,  NO REPORT FROM PRETRIAL DIVERSION WAS RECEIVED; THE  COURT MADEA THIRD REQUEST THAT  PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROVIDE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION RECOMMENDATIONS, INCLUDING LENGTH OF DIVERSION, THIS REPORT WAS DUE TODAY (12-14-21),/X: NO REPORT RECEIVED FROM PRETRIAL DIVERSION,/PROGPCD: 12-28-21/X: FOURTH REQUEST,/CTORD: THAT  PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROVIDE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION RECOMMENDATIONS, INCLUDING LENGTH OF DIVERSION/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/X: ZOOM OK,/

/CAL: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT AND RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM PRETRIAL DIVERSION REGARDING RECOMMENDATIONS AND LENGTH OF DIVERSION/DAWT/X: ON 10-05-21, PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION WAS GRANTED AS TO COUNT 3 ANDTHE CASE WAS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR A PCD PROGRESS REPORT TO BEFILED BY THE NEXT COURT DATE, IN ADDITION, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PRETRIALDIVERSION PROVIDE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION RECOMMENDATIONS, INCLUDING LENGTH OF DIVERSION, THIS REPORT WAS DUE ON 11-10-21,/X: ON 11-10-21,  NO REPORT FROM PRETRIAL DIVERSION WAS RECEIVED; THE  COURT MADE A SECOND REQUEST THAT  PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROVIDE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION RECOMMENDATIONS, INCLUDING LENGTH OF DIVERSION, THIS REPORT WAS DUE TODAY (12-09-21),//X: NO REPORT RECEIVED FROM PRETRIAL DIVERSION,/PROGPCD: 12-14-21/X: THIRDREQUEST,/CTORD: THAT  PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROVIDE PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION RECOMMENDATIONS, INCLUDING LENGTH OF DIVERSION/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVERDIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPC/

/CAL: PRIMARY CARE GIVER DIVERSION PRGRESS REPORT/DAWT/FAVRPT/CTORD: PCDTO SUPPLY RECOMMENDATIONS AND DURATION FOR DIVERSION BY NEXT COURT DATE,THIS HAS BEEN ORDERED PREVIOUSLY/PROGPCD: 12-09-21/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPC/X: ZOOM OK/

/CAL: PRIMARY CARE GIVER DIVERSION MOTION AND ACM PROGRESS REPORT/X: THE DEFENDANT APPEARS VIA ZOOM/M0 GRTD/CONTD PCD PROG RPT/PCD: 1/PROGPCD: 11-10-21/CONTD: PRIMARY CARE GIVER RECOMMENDATIONS AND LENGTH OF DIVERSION/DOP/X: ZOOM OK/X: THESE ARE AMENDED MINUTES AS OF 11-10-21 TO MAKE DIVERSIONCORRECTION//CAL: PRIMARY CARE GIVER DIVERSION MOTION AND ACM PROGRESS REPORT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: THIS IS A DUPLICATE OFLINE #8/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PARTIES ARE NOT READY TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSIONMOTION IN D9/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD: ACM RELEASE IS MODIFIED TO CALL IN 2 TIMES PER WEEK,  IN PERSON CHECK-IN'S ARE NO LONGER REQUIRED/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HERING AND JOIN 20002704/DAWT/X:JUDGE COLFAX AND COURTREPORTER AND CLERK IN COURTROOM/X:ATTY, CARL AND DA MAHONEY VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL HAS AUTHORITY TO WAIVE THE 60TH DAY/X:WAIVED OF 60TH ALLOWED PER EMERGENCY ORDER (CURRENT COVID-19 PANDEMIC)/VD: 07-09-21 THE 60TH DAY/STWPX/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING 07-20-21 WITHCASE NO, 2002704/DOP/X:ESTIMATE TOTAL 4 HOURS 21004442 & 2002704/
